results.title: Campanology (Wikipedia)
results.snippet: Source-domain: change-ringing methods; algorithmic per-bell rules generate full extents.
results.judge_reason: Generic campanology overview without Cayley/Hamiltonian framing or LLM connection.

results.title: Cayley Digraphs and the Art of Bell Ringing
results.snippet: Source-domain: Plain Bob Minimus modeled as Cayley digraph; full extent ↔ Hamiltonian circuit.
results.judge_reason: Direct match for the source-side mechanism: Plain Bob as Cayley digraph Hamiltonian circuit.

results.title: Ringing the changes (Plus Magazine)
results.snippet: Source-domain: permutations as vertices, allowed transitions as edges; extent = Hamiltonian cycle.
results.judge_reason: Expository piece on bell-ringing-as-Hamiltonian but lacks explicit Cayley/Plain-Bob terms in snippet.

results.title: Why Prompt Design Matters: Complexity Analysis of Prompt Search Space (ACL 2025)
results.snippet: Analyzes complexity of finding optimal prompts and prompt-space size; optimal search >50% reasoning improvement.
results.judge_reason: Prompt-space complexity is related but uses no enumeration/coverage/rewrite-rule framing.

results.title: Sequential Enumeration in Large Language Models
results.snippet: Sequential naming/production tasks; chain-of-thought for counting strategies; few LLMs spontaneously count.
results.judge_reason: Sequential enumeration of items, not systematic prompt-space coverage with local rewrite rules.

results.title: Prompt Search Space Complexity Analysis (full arXiv)
results.snippet: Same as ACL paper; full version.
results.judge_reason: Same complexity-analysis content as ACL version, lacks Cayley/Hamiltonian enumeration framing.

results.title: Large Language Models for Combinatorial Optimization: A Systematic Review
results.snippet: Survey of LLMs for combinatorial optimization.
results.judge_reason: Broad LLM-for-CO survey unrelated to change-ringing or Cayley-Hamiltonian prompt enumeration.

results.title: Systematic Survey of Automatic Prompt Optimization (EMNLP 2025)
results.snippet: Survey of automatic prompt optimization techniques.
results.judge_reason: Prompt-optimization survey does not address Hamiltonian-cycle enumeration or coverage guarantees.
